Incident\",\"label\":gs.getMessageLang(\"Migrate Incident\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())},{\"value\":\"View Migration status\",\"label\":gs.getMessageLang(\"View Migration status\", !gs.nil(option) && !global.JSUtil.nil(option.value) && !global.JSUtil.nil(option.label);}function fixInvalid(invalidOption) {var fixedOption = {'value': 'no_data', 'label': 'no_data'};if (!gs.nil(invalidOption)) {fixedOption.value = !global.JSUtil.nil(invalidOption.value) ? invalidOption.value : fixedOption.value;fixedOption.label = !global.JSUtil.nil(invalidOption.label) ? invalidOption.label : fixedOption.label;}return fixedOption;}function normalizeKeys(obj){Object.keys(obj).forEach(function (key) {var k = key.toLowerCase();if (k !== key) {obj[k] = obj[key];delete obj[key];}});return (obj);}var choiceOptions = [];choiceOptions = vaRuntimeUtil.executeFunction(funcObj, 'buildOptions');var noOptions = gs.nil(choiceOptions) || choiceOptions.length==0;if (noOptions) {choiceOptions = [];}else {var invalidCount = 0;var normalizedChoiceOptions = [];for (var i = 0; i < choiceOptions.length; i++) {normalizedChoiceOptions.push(normalizeKeys(choiceOptions[i]));}choiceOptions = normalizedChoiceOptions;for (var i = 0; i < choiceOptions.length; i++) {if (global.JSUtil.nil(choiceOptions[i].label)) {choiceOptions[i].label = choiceOptions[i].value;}}for (var i = 0; i < choiceOptions.length; i++) {if (!isValid(choiceOptions[i])) {invalidCount++;choiceOptions[i] = fixInvalid(choiceOptions[i]);}}noOptions = invalidCount === choiceOptions.length;if (noOptions) {choiceOptions = [];}vaVars.optionsCount_d220d0c6e75e478ba02bb408eb4aea22 = choiceOptions.length;return
